name: Crispy Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized paper or plastic bag, mix together the flour, bread crumbs, and spices.
2. Dip each chicken piece in egg, then shake two or three pieces at a time to coat them with the breadcrumb mixture.
3. Place the coated chicken skin side down in a greased pan.
4. Bake the chicken at 400°F for thirty minutes.
5. Turn the chicken over, reduce the heat to 350°F, and continue baking for another 20-30 minutes.
6. Serve with mashed potatoes and gravy.
